metadata.description: Every token accounted for. Context health toolkit for Claude Code.

plugins.name: allay-state-keeper
plugins.description: Preserves Claude Code context across compactions. Writes checkpoint before compaction wipes context.

plugins.name: allay-token-saver
plugins.description: Reduces token usage by compressing verbose tool outputs and blocking duplicate file reads.

plugins.name: allay-context-guard
plugins.description: The eyes of Allay. Detects when Claude is spinning in circles (Drift Alert), forecasts turns until compaction (Runway), and proves exact savings (/allay:report).
